method.name: EnrollStart

arg.name: enrollInfo
arg.description: JSON format. For UKey authentication: {"ukey": {"pin": "<PIN code>", "serial_number": "<device serial>"}}. For biometric authentication: pass an empty string "{}".

method.description: Start enrollment. The device will emit EnrollStatus signals during the process and return the final FeatureData JSON upon completion.

method.name: EnrollStop
method.description: Stop an on-going fingerprint enrollment started with EnrollStart.

method.name: IdentifyStart

arg.name: identifyInfo
arg.description: JSON format. For biometric: {"feature_ids": ["<id1>", "<id2>"]} (optional, empty to match all enrolled features). For UKey: {"ukey": {"pin": "<PIN code>", "serial_number": "<device serial>"}, "rebinding": <bool>} where rebinding indicates whether to re-associate the UKey with the current user.

method.description: Start identification (one-to-many matching). The device will emit IdentifyStatus signals during the process. Identification compares the scanned biometric against all previously enrolled features without knowing the user identity in advance.

method.name: IdentifyStop
method.description: Stop an on-going fingerprint identification started with IdentifyStart.

method.name: IdentifyResultPostProcess

arg.name: extraInfo
arg.description: JSON format with fields: "os_user" (string, the operating system user name), "result" (int, 0 on failure, 1 on success), "fail_reason" (string, error message when result is 0, optional).

method.description: Perform post-processing after identification result (both success and failure). For virtual drivers, this triggers login log reporting and leave-detection.

arg.name: feature_id_list
arg.description: Get the feature ID list of the current device

property.name: DeviceType
property.description: The device type. Refer to enum DeviceType in file kas-authentication-i.h. FingerPrint:0, Face:1, FingerVein:2, Iris:3, VoicePrint:4, UKey:5, Virtual_Face:1000, Virtual_Code:1001, Virtual_Code_No_Camera:1002.

property.name: DeviceStatus
property.description: The device status. Refer to enum DeviceStatus in file kas-authentication-i.h. ERROR:0 device error, BUSY:1 device is busy, IDLE:2 device is idle, DOING_ENROLL:3 device is enrolling, DOING_IDENTIFY:4 device is identifying, DISABLE:5 device is disabled.

property.name: DeviceDriver
property.description: The driver name of this device, e.g. "kiran-ukey", "kiran-face".

arg.name: data
arg.description: JSON string of feature data, containing: "feature" (base64-encoded binary feature data), "featureID" (string), "featureName" (string), "iid" (string, identification ID), "userName" (string), "idVendor" (string, USB vendor ID), "idProduct" (string, USB product ID), "deviceSerialNumber" (string), "deviceType" (int, refer to enum DeviceType in kas-authentication-i.h), "authType" (int, refer to enum KADAuthType in kas-authentication-i.h).

arg.name: progress
arg.description: A number between 0 and 100 to indicate enrollment progress. 0 means failed, 100 means completed.

arg.name: result
arg.description: Enrollment result status. Refer to enum EnrollStatus in file kas-authentication-i.h. COMPLETE: enrollment succeeded. FAIL: enrollment failed.

arg.name: message
arg.description: Human-readable status description, can be displayed to the user.

arg.name: feature_id
arg.description: Feature ID that was matched, or empty if no match found.

arg.name: result
arg.description: Identification result. Refer to enum IdentifyStatus in file kas-authentication-i.h. MATCH: identification succeeded. NOT_MATCH: no match. RETRY: scan quality issue, may retry. NORMAL: intermediate status.

arg.name: message
arg.description: Human-readable status description, can be displayed to the user.
